user_story: As a manager, I want to view a list of pending training enrollments with employee, class, department, position, title, schedule and status, so that I can review enrollments requiring approval.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Training Mass Approval screen; When the page loads; Then a list displays employee, employee class, department, position, title, schedule from, schedule to and status

user_story: As a manager, I want to filter enrollments by training title, so that I can focus on approvals for a specific training.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Training Mass Approval screen; When I select a training title and search; Then only enrollments for that training are listed

user_story: As a manager, I want to approve multiple training enrollments at once, so that I can process approvals efficiently for many employees.
acceptance_criteria: Given enrollments are listed on the Training Mass Approval screen; When I select multiple enrollments and approve them; Then all selected enrollments are approved together

user_story: As a manager, I want to reset the filter and refresh the list, so that I can restore the default view and see current pending approvals.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied a filter on the Training Mass Approval screen; When I click Reset or Refresh; Then the filter is cleared and the list reloads with current data
